title: Brasilia's LRT turns to APS technology to protect its modernist landscape
description: Ground-level power supply avoids overhead wires, respects the protected Plano Piloto and repositions W3 Avenue as a mobility corridor.

title: Brazil's Line 17 and National Rail Plan signal a new technology cycle
description: From automated monorail operations in Sao Paulo to new freight corridors, Brazil is rebuilding rail as strategic infrastructure.

title: Brazil pours R$100 billion into five mega-corridors to quadruple rail freight share by 2035
description: Brazil's R$100 billion National Railways Plan aims to quadruple the freight rail share from 17% to 40% by 2035, stitching together five mega-corridors that cros

title: Korail to Replace KTX-I Fleet with 49 EMU-320 High-Speed Trainsets
description: South Korea's Korail plans to order 49 EMU-320 trainsets to replace aging KTX-I fleet, with first units entering service from 2032.

title: European Sleeper targets Milan launch amid regulatory hurdles
description: Open-access night train operator European Sleeper prepares Milan-Brussels service while tackling French and German barriers.
